heroImage.alt: Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple, Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Maa Kaali and Bhagwan Shankar Temple is an ancient Hindu temple.
overview.description: Maa Kaali and Bhagwan Shankar Temple is an ancient Hindu temple. It is situated in Bisauri village Jaunpur district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Maha Shivratri and Navratri are some main festivals celebrated.

topPlaces.name: Bisauri
topPlaces.description: Bisauri is a village of the Jaunpur district, Uttar Pradesh, Northern India. Bisauri's Postal Index Number is 222129 and its post office is at Patrahi.

topPlaces.name: Tiwaripur, Jaunpur
topPlaces.description: Tiwaripur is situated in Kerakat tehsil, Jaunpur district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is one of 425 villages in the tehsil and forms a part of Bisauri gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Zabran Pur
topPlaces.description: Zabran Pur, also Zabranpur or Zabaranpur, otherwise Jabaranpur, Jabranpur or Jabran Pur, is a small village in Saidpur block, Ghazipur district, Varanasi division, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Kashidaspur
topPlaces.description: Kashidaspur is a village in Jaunpur, Uttar Pradesh, India.

items.note: Bisauri is a village of the Jaunpur district, Uttar Pradesh, Northern India. Bisauri's Postal Index Number is 222129 and its post office is at Patrahi.
Tiwaripur is situated in Kerakat tehsil, Jaunpur district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is one of 425 villages in the tehsil and forms a part of Bisauri gram panchayat.
Zabran Pur, also Zabranpur or Zabaranpur, otherwise Jabaranpur, Jabranpur or Jabran Pur, is a small village in Saidpur block, Ghazipur district, Varanasi division, Uttar Pradesh, India.
Kashidaspur is a village in Jaunpur, Uttar Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Maa Kaali & Bhagwan Shankar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bisauri, Tiwaripur, Jaunpur, Zabran Pur, Kashidaspur.
